# Pull Request

This repository is for public support documentation and issue tracking only.

Accepted pull requests are limited to:

- typo fixes
- support documentation improvements
- issue template improvements
- project link updates approved by `bearaujus`

Do not submit addon source code, private builds, copied assets, decompiled code, or generated artifacts.

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR changes only public support-repository files.
- [ ] I own or have permission to submit all content in this PR.
- [ ] This PR does not include addon source code or private artifacts.
